description_long: This object is a small, young potted plant with a slender green stem and four broad, glossy leaves arranged in pairs at two heights. The leaves are elongated, slightly curved, and have a smooth surface with visible central veins. The plant appears healthy and vibrant, with a fresh green coloration that suggests new growth. There is no visible pot or container, and the base of the stem is cleanly cut, giving the impression of a decorative or artificial plant. The overall form is simple and minimalistic, making it suitable for modern urban environments. No decorative elements or plant labels are visible on the object.
description: A small, young plant with a slender green stem and four broad, glossy leaves, suitable for modern urban decor.
description_view_0: Front view showing two pairs of broad, glossy leaves symmetrically arranged on a slender stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and curvature of the leaves, with the stem partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the leaves and the central stem, with leaf veins less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the leaves and the stem, emphasizing their curvature.
